name: sidecar_wal_without_shm
description: The workspace includes a stray WAL sidecar without a matching SHM sidecar or coordinated writer state.
source_hint: Represents the stale or missing sidecar family called out in beads_rust-rsei.2.1.
notes: The database file itself is healthy so future tests can isolate how startup reacts to sidecar mismatch.
The WAL payload is intentionally synthetic and small.
